app.name: Music to MIDI
app.subtitle: Intelligently convert music to MIDI files

dropzone.title: Drop audio file here, or click to select
dropzone.subtitle: Supports MP3, WAV, FLAC, OGG, M4A

mode.label: Processing Mode
mode.smart_tooltip: Direct multi-instrument transcription of full audio, recognizes 128 GM instruments, no source separation needed
mode.vocal_split_tooltip: Separate vocals and accompaniment with BS-RoFormer, then transcribe both with YourMT3+; outputs two MIDI files by default, with optional merged MIDI
mode.six_stem_split_tooltip: Separate bass / drums / guitar / piano / vocals / other stems, then transcribe and merge MIDI
mode.piano_transkun_tooltip: Use the dedicated Transkun piano model for pure piano audio
mode.piano_aria_amt_tooltip: Use the dedicated Aria-AMT piano model for pure piano audio
mode.smart_hint:
Transcribe full audio directly, recognizes 128 GM instruments.
Track count is determined automatically by the model.
mode.vocal_split_desc: 🎤  BS-RoFormer + YourMT3+  —  Vocal Split + Separate Transcription
mode.vocal_split_hint:
Separate vocals and accompaniment with BS-RoFormer, then transcribe both
with YourMT3+ independently. Outputs two MIDI files by default; optionally add one merged MIDI.
mode.six_stem_split_desc: 🎚  BS-RoFormer SW  —  Six-Stem Split + Separate Transcription
mode.six_stem_split_hint: Exports six stem WAV files, generates MIDI for selected stems, then merges them into one MIDI.
mode.piano_transkun_hint: Best for pure piano audio. Uses Transkun packaged pretrained resources; quality presets do not change checkpoint inference.
mode.piano_aria_amt_hint: Best for pure piano audio. Requires the Aria-AMT checkpoint to be downloaded first.

engine.label: Preferred Engine
engine.aria_amt_tooltip: Dedicated piano backend. SMART/VOCAL_SPLIT still use the multi-instrument backend; six-stem piano can prefer Aria-AMT.
engine.aria_amt_general_hint: Aria-AMT is the preferred piano backend; full-mix transcription still uses YourMT3+ / MIROS.
engine.aria_amt_six_stem_hint: In six-stem mode, the piano stem prefers Aria-AMT while other stems use the multi-instrument backend.
engine.aria_amt_with_miros_hint: Piano stem prefers Aria-AMT; multi-instrument passes use MIROS.
engine.dedicated_mode_hint: Dedicated piano modes use the selected piano model directly and skip the multi-instrument backend.
engine.yourmt3_tooltip: Default full multi-instrument backend based on YourMT3+ MoE.
engine.yourmt3_general_hint: Use YourMT3+ MoE for the full multi-instrument pass.
engine.yourmt3_six_stem_hint: Six-stem mode uses YourMT3+ on the full mix, then routes notes to stem MIDI files by GM family.
engine.miros_tooltip: 2025 AMT Challenge winner. Requires a local ai4m-miros checkout and its runtime dependencies.
engine.miros_general_hint: Use MIROS for the full multi-instrument pass.
engine.miros_six_stem_hint: Six-stem mode uses MIROS on the full mix, then routes notes to stem MIDI files by GM family.
engine.quality_partial_hint: Quality presets affect only the multi-instrument backend; Aria-AMT/Transkun use fixed checkpoint quality.
engine.quality_configurable_hint: Quality selector applies to the YourMT3+ full-mix pass and supports fast / balanced / best.
engine.quality_fixed_hint: This path uses a fixed checkpoint quality; fast / balanced / best does not change backend inference.
engine.track_mode_tooltip: YourMT3+ output layout: multi-track keeps recognized GM instruments separate; single-track merges non-drum notes into one melodic track and keeps the GM drum track.
engine.yourmt3_arch_hint: Official YourMT3 naming: YPTF+Single uses a single-decoder checkpoint; YPTF+Multi / MoE+Multi use multi-channel decoding such as mc13_full_plus_256 and multi-t5, then merge decoded notes. This app keeps the stronger YourMT3+ MoE Multi backend; the selector above changes only the MIDI output layout, not the checkpoint.

about.title: About Music to MIDI
about.description: Convert audio to multi-track MIDI files
about.author: Author
